data.title: Cooper Companies expected to report higher Q4 earnings; analysts forecast $1.11 per share, revenue $1.06B. Share repurchase program increased to $1B. Stocks rose 0.2% to $75.98 on Wednesday.
data.description: The Cooper Companies, Inc. (NASDAQ: COO) is set to announce its fourth-quarter earnings on December 4. Analysts forecast earnings of $1.11 per share, up from $1.04 per share last year. The expected quarterly revenue is $1.06 billion, compared to $1.02 billion the previous year. Following board approval on September 17, Cooper Companies initiated a $1 billion increase in their share repurchase program. Closing at $75.98 on Wednesday, Cooper Companies shares saw a 0.2% increase. For additional analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.
Lebanon president says next round of Israel talks to begin December 19

data.title: Polaris adds RZR Pro R 4 and Sportsman XP 1000 in Call of Duty®: Warzone Season 01, enhancing gaming experience.
data.description: Gaming enthusiasts are now able to immerse themselves in the realistic performance of Polaris through two renowned vehicles. This collaboration between Polaris Inc. (NYSE: PII), a top player in powersports and off-road advancements, and Call of Duty® aims to provide gamers with a unique gaming experience. The expansion of this collaboration was announced on December 4, 2025, in Minneapolis. Polaris Inc., known for its innovative products in the powersports and off-road sectors, is taking steps to enhance the gaming experiences of players, showcasing its commitment to innovation and excellence.

data.title: FOX News Media presents first interviews with Erika Kirk for late husband Charlie Kirk's book tour "Stop, In the Name of God" starting the week of December 8th.
data.description: FOX News Media is set to air the initial interviews with Erika Kirk, Turning Point USA CEO, to kick off the book tour for "STOP, in the Name of God: Why Honoring the Sabbath Will Transform Your Life," penned by her deceased spouse, Charlie Kirk. The interviews will be broadcast throughout the week as a part of the promotional campaign for the book.

data.title: UAE to invest $1bn in Yemen energy rebuild, creating new opportunities for European renewables companies.
data.description: The United Arab Emirates has announced a substantial $1 billion investment in rebuilding Yemen's energy infrastructure. This move not only signifies a significant commitment towards the reconstruction efforts in Yemen but also opens up potential opportunities for European renewable energy and grid companies. This investment has the potential to create partnerships and collaborations between UAE and European firms in the renewable energy sector, highlighting a positive outlook for the future of energy cooperation between the regions.

data.title: Numeric partners with Rooled to enhance finance tech stack with AI automation, aiming to assist high-growth firms.
data.description: In a recent update, Rooled has enhanced its top-notch finance technology stack by integrating Numeric's AI-powered close platform. This collaboration was made public on December 4, 2025 in San Francisco. Numeric, known for its AI-driven close automation platform, has joined forces with Rooled, a prominent company offering CAS, fractional-CFO, and tax services. This strategic partnership aims to bolster Rooled's financial capabilities by incorporating Numeric's cutting-edge AI technology.

data.title: NASA extends agreement with CASIS to manage ISS National Lab through 2030, pushing R&D limits for humanity.
data.description: NASA has announced the extension of its Cooperative Agreement with the Center for the Advancement of Science in Space (CASIS), solidifying their successful partnership in utilizing the International Space Station (ISS) National Lab for research and development (R&D) purposes. This agreement, renewed on December 4, 2025, aims to continue pushing the boundaries of R&D through the ISS National Lab to ultimately benefit humanity. The collaboration has proven to be fruitful, showcasing significant advancements in various scientific fields.

data.title: H2O America recognized by Newsweek as one of America's Most Responsible Companies for second year in a row.
data.description: For the second year running, H2O America has secured a spot on Newsweek's prestigious list of America's Most Responsible Companies. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to social and environmental responsibility. H2O America's dedication to sustainable practices and community engagement has earned them this honor. This accolade underscores the company's efforts in leading by example in corporate responsibility, making a positive impact on society.

data.title: Phreeli launches as privacy-focused mobile carrier in the US, does not collect or sell personal data.
data.description: A new wireless service called Phreeli has been introduced, aiming to offer consumers in the U.S. with a privacy-centric phone service. This service does not gather, trade, or associate personal data, distinguishing itself from other carriers that rely on surveillance for their business models. Phreeli stands out by prioritizing user privacy, featuring a unique double-blind architecture that separates personal data from network activity. This innovative approach ensures utmost privacy protection for consumers.

data.title: AIC A/S increases stake in FirstFarms A/S to 10.69% with 1,310,265 shares after contributing 150,000 shares on Dec 1.
data.description: In accordance with section 30 of the Danish Capital Markets Act, FirstFarms A/S notifies that AIC A/S submitted notice on December 2 regarding a non-cash contribution of 150,000 shares valued at 10 DKK each on December 1, 2025. This contribution has increased AIC A/S's total shares to 1,310,265 with a nominal value of 10 DKK per share, representing 10.69% of FirstFarms A/S's share capital and voting authority.

data.title: Hatch.ai and Instil partner to revolutionize fundraising for nonprofits with new integration, providing comprehensive donor profiles.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Hatch.ai and Instil have unveiled a groundbreaking integration for nonprofits, revolutionizing fundraising strategies. The collaboration merges Hatch.ai's Giving Intelligence Platform with Instil's relationship intelligence software, providing nonprofits with innovative tools to enhance their operations. This integration allows development directors to begin their day by accessing a donor's complete 360° profile, equipping them with crucial information before meetings. This collaboration signifies a significant advancement in nonprofit fundraising efforts.

data.title: Obviant names Mike Madsen as Vice President, National Security, who brings over 30 years of experience in the field.
data.description: In Washington, Obviant, a prominent provider of budget, program, and organizational intelligence aiding government and commercial partners in expedited technology delivery to the warfighter, revealed the selection of Mike Madsen as the Vice President for National Security. With over three decades of experience in national security spanning the Department of War, Air Force, Executive Branch, and commercial domains, Madsen's appointment is anticipated to bring a unique combination of operational expertise to the table.

data.title: Kustomer introduces 2 new AI Assistants: AI automation assistant (GA) & AI observability assistant (EA).
data.description: In New York today, Kustomer unveiled two new members of its AI Assistants lineup: the Kustomer AI automation assistant, now available to the public, and the Kustomer AI observability assistant, currently in Early Access. These tools offer CX teams insight into their customer experience processes, such as workflows, rules, routing logic, and AI agent behavior during live interactions. The automation assistant is now accessible for use, while the observability assistant is still in the Early Access stage. This launch aims to improve customer experience by providing clarity on the factors driving it, with a focus on AI-backed functionalities.

data.title: OptiTrack's PrimeX 120 camera provided sub-millimeter tracking for Cristiano Ronaldo vs. Robot Goalie challenge, reaching 10 G acceleration.
data.description: In Corvallis, Oregon, OptiTrack unveiled that its advanced PrimeX 120 camera system was utilized to capture the high-speed and high-G tracking featured in Mark Rober's latest engineering video. The footage was shot in Portugal and showcased renowned soccer player Cristiano Ronaldo taking high-speed penalty kicks at a robot goalie capable of accelerating at 10 Gs. Mark Rober, a former NASA engineer and a prominent YouTuber, is known for his innovative and entertaining content creation.

data.title: Resecurity, a cybersecurity leader, to sponsor Black Hat MEA 2025 in Riyadh, attracting 45,000 attendees, 450+ exhibitors.
data.description: Resecurity, a renowned global cybersecurity and threat-intelligence provider, will be participating in Black Hat MEA 2025, the largest cybersecurity event in the region. The conference is scheduled for December 2-4, 2025, at the Riyadh Exhibition & Convention Center in Malham, KSA. Black Hat MEA 2025, known as "Cybersecurity’s Global Stage," is expected to draw over 45,000 attendees and feature 450+ exhibitors, including 330 international participants.

data.title: Yamaha to showcase new products at 2026 NAMM Show, with 2 nightly shows; leading manufacturer of musical instruments.
data.description: Experience the latest technology and two exciting live performances at the Yamaha Grand Plaza Stage in BUENA PARK, California. On December 4, 2025, Yamaha, the top musical instrument manufacturer globally, revealed its participation at The NAMM Show happening in January in Anaheim.

data.title: Bolzano introduces myCIVIS, an AI platform, to enhance citizen services, address workforce shortages, and modernize care.
data.description: The latest platform introduced in Bolzano, myCIVIS, utilizes artificial intelligence to enhance public services, promote trust, and revamp healthcare. This innovative system seeks to tackle issues such as workforce scarcities by offering cutting-edge solutions to improve service efficiency and user experience. By harnessing AI technology, myCIVIS aims to modernize care processes and create a more seamless experience for individuals accessing public services.

Supervisor board meets for Unibail-Rodamco-Westfield N.V.; discussing important issues.

data.title: Annual insurance checkup is crucial for the new year, protecting health, finances, and personal growth. LOS ANGELES, Dec. 4, 2025.
data.description: Consider prioritizing a review of your insurance policies as part of your resolutions for the upcoming year. In Los Angeles on December 4, 2025, it is highlighted that the start of the new year often prompts individuals to set goals related to health, finances, or personal development. However, ensuring the security of what is important is just as vital. Take this opportunity to evaluate your insurance coverage and make any necessary updates to safeguard your assets and loved ones as you move into the new year.
